5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch

5 I 7 1001011101 6 mismatch

5 AND 72 1000000101 3 mismatch

Extending defaults
3 0100101101 5
4 0011101100 5
5 0011111010 6
Starting at I 4 increasing
I 5 1001101011 partial 0010111001 5
I 6 1100101001 partial 0000111010 4
I 7 1001011101 partial 0101011000 4
left 13
Starting at I 3 decreasing
I 2 1010100111 partial 0110100010 4
I 1 1111000101 partial 0011010110 5

right 13
Choosing left
3 I 5
4 I 6
5 I 7

Selected
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 XOR 50
4 XOR 61
5 XOR 72
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 01001110
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 I 3 = 0
2 I 4 = 1
3 XOR 50 = XOR(I 5,I 0) = XOR(1,0) = 1
4 XOR 61 = XOR(I 6,I 1) = XOR(1,1) = 0
5 XOR 72 = XOR(I 7,I 2) = XOR(0,0) = 0
6 I 3 = 0
7 I 4 = 1

\boxed{00110001}
